Internal Compliance Memo: Data handling for Lakan Bay Holdings, Inc. in relation to ICX listing timetable and HR/tax workflows.
Prepared by: Atty. Reina M. Soliman, Corporate Secretary; contact: reina.soliman@lakanbay.com.ph.
For purposes of Philippine data privacy law and the Republic Securities Code, we note that personal data means information from which an individual’s identity is apparent or may be ascertained with other data, and MNPI means information a reasonable investor would consider important and is not public.
Cross-border transfer: Approval granted under Data Export Form DX-14 to transmit payroll and equity grant records to our Singapore payroll processor on 30 June, limited to hashed TINs, redacted account numbers (last 4), and employee IDs.
Data minimisation: HR onboarding form OF-22 revised to remove mother’s maiden name and childhood city; only necessary banking details for Aurora Trust Bank direct credit are collected.
Retention: Schedule B to the DPA with DeltaPay Services Pte. sets five-year retention for tax support files and 24 months for recruitment logs; earlier versions are superseded.
DSAR: On 12 May, Mr. Jeric Valencia submitted an access request seeking his 2023 equity grant details and timekeeping logs; response acknowledged within 72 hours, full extract queued for release by 19 May.
Consent withdrawal: Ms. L. Yatco withdrew consent for marketing emails on 5 May; marketing lists were updated and her records flagged for suppression; no payroll processing is affected.
Erasure: Following exit of Ms. Yatco from the talent pool, candidate profile deletion was completed on 20 May across ATS and shared drives; audit trail retained per Schedule B.
MNPI controls: Draft ICX offering timetable and unaudited Q2 results remain restricted; no trading window has been opened and no external sharing has occurred.
Negative confirmation: No special cross-border transfers of customer loan files occurred in May; any transfers of customer PII remain subject to prior written approval under DX-14.
Banking reconciliation: Payroll file for cycle 15 June carries masked account references (e.g., 88-XXX4567-9) and will not include birthdates; this change is now part of OF-22.
Tax: Internal Form TX-27 (with salary breakdowns) is furnished to the Isla Revenue Bureau portal only from anonymised staging, with named fields restored on-device by the authorised tax officer.
Disclosure: The draft Form A-12 annual report will omit individual-level HR or banking identifiers; only de-identified aggregates are to be included, and any person-level data is expressly prohibited.
Note that past remedial actions were completed; there is no outstanding erasure backlog and the prior privacy incident register has zero open items as of 25 May.
Queries on this memo or DSAR tracking may be sent to privacy@lakanbay.com.ph.
